metadata.description: Zama skills for AI agents — the missing knowledge between models and production encrypted smart contracts.

plugins.name: zama-protocol
plugins.description: Three skills for building confidential dApps on Zama's FHEVM: zama-protocol (concepts, architecture, addresses), zama-solidity (encrypted Solidity, ACL, ERC-7984), and zama-typescript (SDK integration, React/viem/ethers/Node).
